name: codebase-design
description: Shared vocabulary for designing deep modules: a lot of behaviour behind a small interface, placed at a clean seam, testable through that interface. Precise glossary (module, interface, implementation, depth, seam, adapter, leverage, locality), the deletion test, the one-adapter-vs-two seam rule, and testability checks. Bundles DEEPENING.md and DESIGN-IT-TWICE.md. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts.
